fields.fieldText: Meeting Cancelled

fields.name: Cancelled_Reason
fields.fieldText: Cancelled Reason

fields.name: Cancelled_Validation_Message
fields.fieldText: Please add Cancelled/Unqualified Reason - Details to continue

fields.name: Rescheduling_Reminder
fields.fieldText: Rescheduling Reminder

fields.name: Rescheduling_Info
fields.fieldText: ℹ️ Optional reminder to the meeting creator

fields.name: Date_Validation_Text
fields.fieldText:
Oops!

Meeting date ({!Get_Meeting.Date__c}) cannot be in the future, please adjust the date before completing

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
Oops! The process encountered an error!

Please contact SalesOps with the error message below

fields.name: Flow_Error_Message
fields.fieldText: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Status
fields.fieldText: Status

fields.name: Meeting_Summary_Header
fields.fieldText:
Meeting Summary


Pick the primary answer if more than one applies

fields.name: Fields_Not_Populated_Error
fields.fieldText: Please complete all fields below

fields.name: Primary_Use_Case_Info
fields.fieldText:
This team or persona have a pain we can solve

* Selecting "No Fit" will disqualify the Meeting

fields.name: Right_Contact_Info
fields.fieldText: Potential champion, decision-maker, or an end-user

fields.name: Budget_Info
fields.fieldText: Initial indication if their budget meets minimum pricing

fields.name: Timing_Info
fields.fieldText: Estimated time frame for initiating a sales cycle

fields.name: Success_Message
fields.fieldText: Meeting Updated Succesfully!

fields.fieldText: Meeting Unqualified - No Fit
